<content>1: /**
2:  * @fileType utility
3:  * @domain infra
4:  * @pattern pipeline-health, zod-validation
5:  * @ai-summary Pipeline health monitoring utility for Cody pipeline stages
6:  */
7: 
8: import { z } from 'zod'
9: 
10: // =============================================================================
11: // TypeScript Interfaces
12: // =============================================================================
13: 
14: /**
15:  * Represents the health status of a pipeline stage
16:  */
17: export interface HealthStatus {
18:   /** Name of the stage */
19:   stage: string
20:   /** Whether the stage is healthy */
21:   isHealthy: boolean
22:   /** Timestamp of the last health check */
23:   lastCheck: Date
24:   /** Optional message providing additional context */
25:   message?: string
26: }
27: 
28: /**
29:  * Represents a comprehensive pipeline health report
30:  */
31: export interface Report {
32:   /** Timestamp when the report was generated */
33:   timestamp: Date
34:   /** Array of health statuses for all stages */
35:   stages: HealthStatus[]
36:   /** Overall health classification */
37:   overallHealth: 'healthy' | 'degraded' | 'unhealthy'
38: }
39: 
40: /**
41:  * Represents retry recommendations for a failed stage
42:  */
43: export interface RetryStrategy {
44:   /** Name of the stage */
45:   stage: string
46:   /** Recommended number of retry attempts */
47:   recommendedRetries: number
48:   /** Backoff multiplier for exponential backoff */
49:   backoffMultiplier: number
50:   /** Whether retrying is recommended */
51:   shouldRetry: boolean
52: }
53: 
54: // =============================================================================
55: // Zod Input Validation Schemas
56: // =============================================================================
57: 
58: /** Schema for validating stage names in checkStageHealth */
59: const checkStageHealthSchema = z.string().min(1, 'Stage name is required')
60: 
61: /** Schema for validating stage names in getRetryRecommendation */
62: const getRetryRecommendationSchema = z.string().min(1, 'Stage name is required')
63: 
64: // =============================================================================
65: // Known Pipeline Stages
66: // =============================================================================
67: 
68: /** Known pipeline stage names */
69: const KNOWN_STAGES = [
70:   'taskify',
71:   'gap',
72:   'architect',
73:   'plan-gap',
74:   'build',
75:   'review',
76:   'fix',
77:   'verify',
78:   'commit',
79:   'docs',
80: ] as const
81: 
82: /** Type for known stage names */
83: type KnownStage = (typeof KNOWN_STAGES)[number]
84: 
85: /**
86:  * Default timeout values in milliseconds per stage name
87:  * These represent typical maximum execution times for each pipeline stage
88:  */
89: const STAGE_TIMEOUTS: Record<KnownStage, number> = {
90:   taskify: 30000, // 30 seconds
91:   gap: 60000, // 1 minute
92:   architect: 120000, // 2 minutes
93:   'plan-gap': 90000, // 1.5 minutes
94:   build: 300000, // 5 minutes
95:   review: 180000, // 3 minutes
96:   fix: 120000, // 2 minutes
97:   verify: 60000, // 1 minute
98:   commit: 30000, // 30 seconds
99:   docs: 60000, // 1 minute
100: }
101: 
102: /** Default timeout for unknown stages (in milliseconds) */
103: const DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 60000 // 1 minute
104: 
105: // =============================================================================
106: // Helper Functions
107: // =============================================================================
108: 
109: /**
110:  * Returns the default timeout value for a given stage name
111:  * @param stage - The name of the pipeline stage
112:  * @returns Timeout value in milliseconds, or DEFAULT_TIMEOUT if stage is unknown
113:  */
114: export function getStageTimeout(stage: string): number {
115:   const normalizedStage = stage.toLowerCase() as KnownStage
116:   return STAGE_TIMEOUTS[normalizedStage] ?? DEFAULT_TIMEOUT
117: }
118: 
119: // =============================================================================
120: // PipelineHealthReport Class
121: // =============================================================================
122: 
123: /**
124:  * Class for monitoring Cody pipeline health
125:  */
126: export class PipelineHealthReport {
127:   /**
128:    * Known stages tracked by this health reporter
129:    */
130:   private readonly trackedStages: readonly string[] = KNOWN_STAGES
131: 
132:   /**
133:    * Check the health status of a pipeline stage
134:    * @param stage - The name of the stage to check
135:    * @returns HealthStatus object with current health information
136:    * @throws ZodError if stage name is invalid (empty string)
137:    */
138:   checkStageHealth(stage: string): HealthStatus {
139:     // Validate input
140:     const validatedStage = checkStageHealthSchema.parse(stage)
141: 
142:     // Normalize stage name
143:     const normalizedStage = validatedStage.toLowerCase()
144: 
145:     // Check if stage is known
146:     const isKnown = this.trackedStages.includes(normalizedStage as KnownStage)
147: 
148:     return {
149:       stage: normalizedStage,
150:       isHealthy: isKnown,
151:       lastCheck: new Date(),
152:       message: isKnown
153:         ? `Stage '${normalizedStage}' is healthy`
154:         : `Stage '${normalizedStage}' is unknown but may be healthy`,
155:     }
156:   }
157: 
158:   /**
159:    * Generate a comprehensive health report for all tracked stages
160:    * @returns Report object with health status of all stages
161:    */
162:   generateReport(): Report {
163:     const stageStatuses: HealthStatus[] = this.trackedStages.map((stage) =>
164:       this.checkStageHealth(stage),
165:     )
166: 
167:     // Determine overall health
168:     const healthyCount = stageStatuses.filter((s) => s.isHealthy).length
169:     const totalCount = stageStatuses.length
170:     const healthyRatio = healthyCount / totalCount
171: 
172:     let overallHealth: 'healthy' | 'degraded' | 'unhealthy'
173:     if (healthyRatio === 1) {
174:       overallHealth = 'healthy'
175:     } else if (healthyRatio >= 0.5) {
176:       overallHealth = 'degraded'
177:     } else {
178:       overallHealth = 'unhealthy'
179:     }
180: 
181:     return {
182:       timestamp: new Date(),
183:       stages: stageStatuses,
184:       overallHealth,
185:     }
186:   }
187: 
188:   /**
189:    * Get retry strategy recommendations for a failed stage
190:    * @param failedStage - The name of the failed stage
191:    * @returns RetryStrategy with retry recommendations
192:    * @throws ZodError if stage name is invalid (empty string)
193:    */
194:   getRetryRecommendation(failedStage: string): RetryStrategy {
195:     // Validate input
196:     const validatedStage = getRetryRecommendationSchema.parse(failedStage)
197: 
198:     // Normalize stage name
199:     const normalizedStage = validatedStage.toLowerCase()
200: 
201:     // Check if stage is known
202:     const isKnownStage = this.trackedStages.includes(normalizedStage as KnownStage)
203: 
204:     // Provide different recommendations based on whether stage is known
205:     if (isKnownStage) {
206:       return {
207:         stage: normalizedStage,
208:         recommendedRetries: 3,
209:         backoffMultiplier: 2,
210:         shouldRetry: true,
211:       }
212:     }
213: 
214:     return {
215:       stage: normalizedStage,
216:       recommendedRetries: 1,
217:       backoffMultiplier: 1.5,
218:       shouldRetry: false,
219:     }
220:   }
221: }
